item.description:
# LocaRec 0.5.0
### Added
- Fix speaker labels straight from the transcript. Right-click a speaker's avatar or name to move that line to the right person, or delete the line when it is just noise. Correcting a line rejoins it with the lines around it when they are the same speaker, and a speaker left with nothing drops off the list.
### Changed
- The record and import controls now sit in the sidebar, within reach on every screen, rather than only in the top-right of the detail view.
Build: 47 Commit: c084f55
